---
title: Optimizing General-Purpose CPUs for Energy-Efficient Mobile Web Computing
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3041024
journ: TOCS
year: 2017
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 18
---
